Team Experience · Amsterdam

More meaningful than a night out. More fun than a training.

A guided creative experience where play unlocks what meetings never could.

Your team will laugh, experiment, and see each other differently.

Book a free call Learn more
What is it

A different kind of time together

Teams go out to have a good time. They take training for results. This is the best of both worlds.

It's a guided creative experience — a mix of hands-on exercises, collaborative games, and shared moments of exploration that take your team out of their everyday roles and into something genuinely different.

No artistic skills needed. No performance expected. Just curiosity, play, and the kind of real interaction that's hard to manufacture.

The format

Clear structure. Shaped around your team.

6–16 participants  ·  2–4 hours  ·  various themes

Creative Connection offers a range of developed experiences. Together we choose which format, theme, and content fits your team best.

Guided creative exercises

Hands-on activities that unlock new ways of thinking — no experience or talent required.

Collaborative games

Your team, cooperating in unusual and unexpected situations.

Reflection moments

Structured pauses where insights land and the group gets to share what came up.

Facilitated discussion

Conversations that give meaning to what was experienced.

The experience

What the experience feels like

Away from screens, roles, and agendas, something shifts. People show up differently when they're playing. They listen more. They surprise each other. They surprise themselves.

This is not

  • An art workshop
  • A therapy session
  • A business training
  • A passive team outing

This is

  • A guided creative experience
  • Play-based collaboration
  • A shared journey
  • A safe space to experiment and be surprised

What participants feel

  • Freedom to play → No judgment, no right answers, no pressure to perform
  • Curiosity and experimentation → The permission to try things that might not work
  • Surprise and laughter → Genuine moments that can't be planned or faked
  • Inspiration and confidence → Leaving with a sense that they're more capable than they thought
Why it matters

Is this for your team? Yes.

It matters for how your team functions.

In any role, people constantly need to find new approaches, adapt, and communicate across differences. Creativity is what makes that possible — and it's a skill that grows when you practise it together.

It matters for how your people feel.

A team that feels inspired, confident, and genuinely connected performs better and stays longer. Wellbeing and results grow from the same place.

What your team walks away with

  • A shared memory and a shared story
  • Deeper understanding of each other
  • Creative confidence and fresh thinking
  • Renewed energy and inspiration
  • A culture where trying new things feels safe

What your organisation gains

  • More openness, adaptability, and innovative thinking
  • Better communication across the team
  • Higher engagement and morale
  • A meaningful investment in people
Where it starts

Every experience is different. Because every team is.

No two teams are the same — and no two experiences are either. Book a free call to explore what Creative Connection could look like for your team: the format, the themes, the content. Shaped around you, from the start.
